data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified navigation to minimize user decision-making time.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu layouts and clear call-to-action buttons.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements placed for easy access and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas and buttons with ample spacing.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: High aesthetic value contributes to perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Use of visually appealing typography and high-quality images.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design familiar to what users see across the web, leading to better user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI patterns and industry-standard navigation practices.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Information is chunked into smaller, digestible pieces for easy comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Use of concise copy, bullet points, and imagery.
